data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Provider visibility of completion status', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met. While the linked use case describes a provider dashboard showing completion percentages, it does not provide concrete evidence of how this visibility is implemented or accessed, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, there is no evidence of the actual API endpoints or data structures that would allow for this visibility, leading to the conclusion that the requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or data structures providing provider visibility of completion status.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API for provider dashboard visibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API returns completion status data for providers.
